positive: A majestic, stylized fox silhouette standing amid stylized wildflowers and abstract swirling autumn foliage. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, designed for apparel printing. Use a highly contrasting, minimalist art style with deep midnight blues and vibrant burnt orange and gold accents. The flora elements should have bold, clean lines and geometric shapes, creating a cohesive and wearable pattern. Focus on strong, crisp outlines and flat color blocking for maximum print transfer fidelity. The overall mood is whimsical and elegant, suitable for high-quality home goods or apparel. Digital illustration, vector art quality, graphic design, high contrast.
